attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CASEMONCOLLREQUEST_ID,  CREATION_DATE,   COLLABORATION_STATUS,
COALESCE(COLLABORATION_TYPE,'NO COLLABORATION TYPE') AS COLLABORATION_TYPE,
COLLABORATION_SUBTYPE,
COLLABORATIONREASON,
COLLAB_INITIATOR_PROFICIENCY,
UPPER(COLLABORATION_REQUESTOR) AS COLLBR_REQUESTER_C3ID,
COALESCE(REQUESTER_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY,699) REQUESTER_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY,
ACCEPTEDBY,
COALESCE(ACCEPTER_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY,699) ACCEPTER_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY,
ACCEPTEDDATE,
CANCELLEDBY,
COALESCE(CANCELLEDBY_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY,699) CANCELLEDBY_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY,
CANCELLEDDATE,
UPPER(COLLABORATION_OWNER) AS COLLABORATION_OWNER,
OWNER_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY,
OWNER_BL_RESOURCE_KEY,
KC_CEC_ID,
COALESCE(CONTRIBUTOR_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY,699) CONTRIBUTOR_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY,
COLLAB_CANCEL_DATE,
C3_SR_ID,
C3_SR_NUMBER,
CASE_TECH_ID,
CASE_SUBTECH_ID,
CASE_PC.PROBLEM_CODE AS CASE_PROBCODE_LOOKUP,
COLLBR_TECH_ID,
COLLBR_SUBTECH_ID,
COLLBR_PC.PROBLEM_CODE AS COLLBR_PROBCODE_LOOKUP,
INTER_SKILL_FLAG,
INTER_TECH_FLAG,
COLLABORATION_REQUEST_EXT_ID,
CASE_TRANSFER_REASON,
COLLBR_REQUEST_DESC,
NAME_VAL,
TIMEZONE_VAL,
CAST(CNTMEMREQ AS INT) AS CNTMEMREQ,
CRNT_KEY_CONTRIBUTION_DATE,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(CHGOWN,0) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS MAKE_ME_OWNER_FLG,
CAST(COUNT_DISPATCHES AS INT) AS COUNT_DISPATCHES,
CAST(CSES_DISPATCHED AS INT) AS CSES_DISPATCHED,
DISPATCH_DATE,
CURRENT_SEVERITY,
COALESCE(CALOG_CREATEDDATE,ACCEPTEDDATE) AS INITIAL_ACCEPT_DATE,
LASTMODIFIEDDATE,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CASEMONCOLLREQUEST_ID ORDER BY REQUESTOR_BL_RESOURCE_KEY DESC,ACCEPTER_BL_RESOURCE_KEY DESC,CANCELER_BL_RESOURCE_KEY DESC,CONTRIBUTOR_BL_RESOURCE_KEY DESC,OWNER_BL_RESOURCE_KEY DESC) RN 

FROM (SELECT A.ID AS CASEMONCOLLREQUEST_ID,A.CREATEDDATE  CREATION_DATE
,A.STATUS COLLABORATION_STATUS
,A.COLLBR_TYPE COLLABORATION_TYPE
,A.COLLBR_SUB_TYPE COLLABORATION_SUBTYPE
,A.COLLABORATIONREASON
,CASE WHEN A.COLLAB_INITIATOR_PROFICIENCY = 'NA' THEN 0 WHEN A.COLLAB_INITIATOR_PROFICIENCY IS NULL THEN 0
ELSE CAST(A.COLLAB_INITIATOR_PROFICIENCY AS INT) END AS COLLAB_INITIATOR_PROFICIENCY
,A.COLLBR_REQUESTER AS COLLABORATION_REQUESTOR
,A.ACCEPTEDBY
,A.ACCEPTEDDATE  ACCEPTEDDATE
,A.CANCELLEDBY
,A.CANCELLEDDATE AS CANCELLEDDATE
,A.CSE_CEC_USER_ID AS KC_CEC_ID
,A.CANCELLEDDATE AS  COLLAB_CANCEL_DATE
,CAST(A.C3_SR_ID AS INT) C3_SR_ID
,A.C3_SR_NUMBER
,CAST(A.CASE_TECH_ID AS INT) CASE_TECH_ID
,CAST(A.CASE_SUBTECH_ID AS INT) CASE_SUBTECH_ID
,A.CASE_PROBCODE_LOOKUP
,CAST(A.COLLBR_TECH_ID AS INT) COLLBR_TECH_ID
,CAST(A.COLLBR_SUBTECH_ID AS INT) COLLBR_SUBTECH_ID
,A.COLLBR_PROBCODE_LOOKUP
,CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN A.COLLAB_INITIATOR_PROFICIENCY = 'NA' THEN 0 WHEN A.COLLAB_INITIATOR_PROFICIENCY IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE CAST(A.COLLAB_INITIATOR_PROFICIENCY AS INT) END ) = 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS INTER_SKILL_FLAG
,CASE WHEN A.CASE_TECH_ID = A.COLLBR_TECH_ID THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS INTER_TECH_FLAG
,A.COLLABORATION_REQUEST_EXT_ID
,A.CASE_TRANSFER_REASON
,A.COLLBR_REQUEST_DESC
,A.NAME_VAL
,A.TIMEZONE_VAL
,A.CSE_CEC_USER_ID COLLABORATION_OWNER
,A.LASTMODIFIEDDATE
,B.CNTMEMREQ AS CNTMEMREQ
,B.MAX_KC_CREATED_DATE AS CRNT_KEY_CONTRIBUTION_DATE
,B.CHGOWN
,C.COUNT_DISPATCHES
,C.CSES_DISPATCHED
,D.CALOG_CREATEDDATE
,E.DISPATCH_DATE
,F.CURRENT_SEVERITY
,G.DW_WORKGROUP_KEY REQUESTER_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY
,G.BL_RESOURCE_KEY AS REQUESTOR_BL_RESOURCE_KEY
,CAST(H.DW_WORKGROUP_KEY AS INT) ACCEPTER_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY
,H.BL_RESOURCE_KEY AS ACCEPTER_BL_RESOURCE_KEY
,CAST(I.DW_WORKGROUP_KEY AS INT) CANCELLEDBY_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY
,I.BL_RESOURCE_KEY AS CANCELER_BL_RESOURCE_KEY
,J.BL_RESOURCE_KEY AS CONTRIBUTOR_BL_RESOURCE_KEY
,CAST(K.DW_WORKGROUP_KEY AS INT) CONTRIBUTOR_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY
,CAST(K.DW_WORKGROUP_KEY AS INT) AS OWNER_DW_WORKGROUP_KEY
,K.BL_RESOURCE_KEY AS OWNER_BL_RESOURCE_KEY

FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CSONE_HB_CASEMONCOLLREQUEST A

LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CASEMONCOLLABREQUEST_ID,COUNT(DISTINCT MEMBER_USER_ID) CNTMEMREQ,
MAX(CASE WHEN MEMBERSHIP_ROLE = 'KEY CONTRIBUTOR' THEN CREATEDDATE ELSE NULL END) AS MAX_KC_CREATED_DATE
,SUM(CASE WHEN PREVIOUS_ROLE = 'OWNER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CHGOWN
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CSONE_HB_CMC_REQ_MBRSHIP GROUP BY CASEMONCOLLABREQUEST_ID) B 
ON A.ID = B.CASEMONCOLLABREQUEST_ID /*COLLABORATION_REQUEST_1*/

LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CD1.COLLABORATIONEXTIDC, MAX(CD1.EVENTDATETIMEC) AS DISPATCH_DATE, COUNT(DISTINCT CD1.TRANSACTION_ID) AS COUNT_DISPATCHES
,COUNT(*) AS CSES_DISPATCHED FROM $$STGDB.WI_BRE_CR_DISPATCH CD1
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_BRE_CSELIST CL ON CD1.TRANSACTION_ID = CL.TRANSACTION_ID
INNER JOIN (SELECT *FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CSONE_HB_CASEMONCOLLREQUEST) COLLABS ON CD1.COLLABORATIONEXTIDC = COLLABS.COLLABORATION_REQUEST_EXT_ID
WHERE CL.EVENTTYPEC = 'CR DISPATCH' AND CD1.EVENTDATETIMEC < COALESCE(COLLABS.CANCELLEDDATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)) 
GROUP BY CD1.COLLABORATIONEXTIDC) C 
ON A.COLLABORATION_REQUEST_EXT_ID = C.COLLABORATIONEXTIDC /* COLLABORATION_REQUEST_2*/

LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CASEMONCOLLREQUEST_ID, COLLABORATION_REQUEST_EXT_ID, OWNER_CEC_ID, CALOG_CREATEDDATE
,ACTIVITY, COLLBR_TYPE, MIN_ACCEPT_DATE
FROM (SELECT A.CASEMONCOLLABORATIONREQUEST_ID CASEMONCOLLREQUEST_ID, B.COLLABORATION_REQUEST_EXT_ID
,A.CREATED_BY OWNER_CEC_ID, A.CREATEDDATE AS CALOG_CREATEDDATE, ACTIVITY, COLLBR_TYPE
,MIN(CASE WHEN COLLBR_TYPE = 'SKR' AND ACTIVITY = 'ADD TEAM MEMBER' THEN A.CREATEDDATE
WHEN COLLBR_TYPE <> 'SKR' AND ACTIVITY = 'ACCEPT' THEN A.CREATEDDATE ELSE NULL END) OVER (PARTITION BY A.CASEMONCOLLABORATIONREQUEST_ID) MIN_ACCEPT_DATE
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CSONE_HB_CASEMONACTIVITYLOG A
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CSONE_HB_CASEMONCOLLREQUEST B 
ON B.ID = A.CASEMONCOLLABORATIONREQUEST_ID WHERE ACTIVITY IN ('ACCEPT', 'ADD TEAM MEMBER')) X
WHERE CALOG_CREATEDDATE = MIN_ACCEPT_DATE) D 
ON A.ID = D.CASEMONCOLLREQUEST_ID /*COLLABORATION_REQUEST_3*/

LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CD1.COLLABORATIONEXTIDC, UPPER(CL.CSEID) AS CSEID
,MAX(CD1.EVENTDATETIMEC) AS DISPATCH_DATE, COUNT(DISTINCT CD1.TRANSACTION_ID) AS COUNT_DISPATCHES
,COUNT(*) AS CSES_DISPATCHED FROM $$STGDB.WI_BRE_CR_DISPATCH CD1
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_BRE_CSELIST CL 
ON CD1.TRANSACTION_ID = CL.TRANSACTION_ID
INNER JOIN (SELECT COLLABS.COLLABORATION_REQUEST_EXT_ID, MAX(COALESCE(COALESCE(CALOG_CREATEDDATE, COLLABS.ACCEPTEDDATE),
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0))) AS MAX_ACCEPT, MAX(COALESCE(COLLABS.CANCELLEDDATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0))) AS CLOSED_DATE
FROM (SELECT CASEMONCOLLREQUEST_ID, COLLABORATION_REQUEST_EXT_ID, OWNER_CEC_ID
,CALOG_CREATEDDATE, ACTIVITY, COLLBR_TYPE, MIN_ACCEPT_DATE
FROM (SELECT A.CASEMONCOLLABORATIONREQUEST_ID CASEMONCOLLREQUEST_ID, B.COLLABORATION_REQUEST_EXT_ID
,A.CREATED_BY OWNER_CEC_ID, A.CREATEDDATE AS CALOG_CREATEDDATE, ACTIVITY, COLLBR_TYPE
,MIN(CASE WHEN COLLBR_TYPE = 'SKR' AND ACTIVITY = 'ADD TEAM MEMBER' THEN A.CREATEDDATE
WHEN COLLBR_TYPE <> 'SKR' AND ACTIVITY = 'ACCEPT' THEN A.CREATEDDATE ELSE NULL
END) OVER (PARTITION BY A.CASEMONCOLLABORATIONREQUEST_ID) MIN_ACCEPT_DATE
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CSONE_HB_CASEMONACTIVITYLOG A
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CSONE_HB_CASEMONCOLLREQUEST B 
ON B.ID = A.CASEMONCOLLABORATIONREQUEST_ID
WHERE ACTIVITY IN ('ACCEPT','ADD TEAM MEMBER')
) X WHERE CALOG_CREATEDDATE = MIN_ACCEPT_DATE
) CALOG
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CSONE_HB_CASEMONCOLLREQUEST COLLABS 
ON CALOG.COLLABORATION_REQUEST_EXT_ID = COLLABS.COLLABORATION_REQUEST_EXT_ID
GROUP BY COLLABS.COLLABORATION_REQUEST_EXT_ID
) FILTER_COLLABS 
ON CD1.COLLABORATIONEXTIDC = FILTER_COLLABS.COLLABORATION_REQUEST_EXT_ID
WHERE CD1.EVENTDATETIMEC < MAX_ACCEPT AND CD1.EVENTDATETIMEC < CLOSED_DATE
GROUP BY COLLABORATIONEXTIDC,CSEID) E 
ON A.COLLABORATION_REQUEST_EXT_ID = E.COLLABORATIONEXTIDC /*COLLABORATION_REQUEST_4*/
AND COALESCE(UPPER(D.OWNER_CEC_ID), UPPER(A.ACCEPTEDBY)) = E.CSEID

LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT INCIDENT_NUMBER C3SRNUMBER,CURRENT_SEVERITY
,CASE WHEN ACTIVITY_CODE = 600 THEN (CAST(ACTIVITY_DATE AS DATE) - 1) ELSE CAST(ACTIVITY_DATE AS DATE) END AS EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
,COALESCE(MAX(ACTIVITY_DATE) OVER (PARTITION BY INCIDENT_NUMBER ORDER BY ACTIVITY_DATE ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING), CAST('3500/01/01' AS DATE)) AS EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_INCIDENTS_F
WHERE ACTIVITY_CODE IN (600,1800)) F /*collaboration_request_5*/
ON A.C3_SR_NUMBER = F.C3SRNUMBER AND A.CREATEDDATE >= F.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND A.CREATEDDATE < F.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE

LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CCO_ID,DW_WORKGROUP_KEY,BL_RESOURCE_KEY
,BL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE  AS BL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE
,BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE  AS BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_RESOURCES_D_WTCALC TRD
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WORKGROUP_HIER_V18_D W 
ON CAST(TRD.WORKGROUP_ID AS INT) = W.NATURAL_KEY) G 
ON A.COLLBR_REQUESTER = G.CCO_ID /*COLLABORATION_REQUEST_6*/
AND A.CREATEDDATE >= G.BL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE
AND A.CREATEDDATE < G.BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE

LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CCO_ID,DW_WORKGROUP_KEY,BL_RESOURCE_KEY
,BL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE AS BL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE
,BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE  AS BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_RESOURCES_D_WTCALC TRD
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WORKGROUP_HIER_V18_D W 
ON CAST(TRD.WORKGROUP_ID AS INT) = W.NATURAL_KEY) H /* COLLABORATION_REQUEST_7*/
ON A.ACCEPTEDBY = H.CCO_ID
AND A.CREATEDDATE >= H.BL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE
AND A.CREATEDDATE < H.BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE

LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CCO_ID,DW_WORKGROUP_KEY,BL_RESOURCE_KEY
,BL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE  AS BL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE
,BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE  AS BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_RESOURCES_D_WTCALC TRD
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WORKGROUP_HIER_V18_D W 
ON CAST(TRD.WORKGROUP_ID AS INT) = W.NATURAL_KEY) I /*COLLABORATION_REQUEST_8*/
ON A.CANCELLEDBY = I.CCO_ID
AND A.CREATEDDATE >= I.BL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE
AND A.CREATEDDATE < I.BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE

LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CCO_ID,DW_WORKGROUP_KEY,BL_RESOURCE_KEY
,BL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE  AS BL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE
,BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE AS BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_RESOURCES_D_WTCALC TRD
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WORKGROUP_HIER_V18_D W 
ON CAST(TRD.WORKGROUP_ID AS INT) = W.NATURAL_KEY
) J /*COLLABORATION_REQUEST_9*/
ON A.CSE_CEC_USER_ID = J.CCO_ID
AND A.CREATEDDATE >= J.BL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE
AND A.CREATEDDATE < J.BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE

LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT CCO_ID,DW_WORKGROUP_KEY,BL_RESOURCE_KEY
,BL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE  AS BL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE
,BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE  AS BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_RESOURCES_D_WTCALC TRD
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_WORKGROUP_HIER_V18_D W 
ON CAST(TRD.WORKGROUP_ID AS INT) = W.NATURAL_KEY) K  /*COLLABORATION_REQUEST_10*/
ON A.CSE_CEC_USER_ID = K.CCO_ID
AND A.CREATEDDATE >= K.BL_EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE
AND A.CREATEDDATE < K.BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE
) CR 

LEFT JOIN (SELECT ID AS PROBLEMCODE_ID, PROBLEM_CODE 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CSONE_HB_PROBLEM_CODE) CASE_PC
ON CR.CASE_PROBCODE_LOOKUP = CASE_PC.PROBLEMCODE_ID

LEFT JOIN (SELECT ID AS PROBLEMCODE_ID, PROBLEM_CODE 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CSONE_HB_PROBLEM_CODE) COLLBR_PC
ON CR.COLLBR_PROBCODE_LOOKUP = COLLBR_PC.PROBLEMCODE_ID
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CASEMONCOLLREQUEST_ID ORDER BY REQUESTOR_BL_RESOURCE_KEY DESC,ACCEPTER_BL_RESOURCE_KEY DESC,CANCELER_BL_RESOURCE_KEY DESC,CONTRIBUTOR_BL_RESOURCE_KEY DESC,OWNER_BL_RESOURCE_KEY DESC) = 1
